badges.title: Mutual Aid Field Agent
badges.description: For anyone who shows up without needing to be asked.

badges.title: Civic Mischief Technician
badges.description: For playful, useful interventions in public space.

badges.title: Disaster Weirdness Liaison
badges.description: For the person who can function inside chaos and still make people laugh.

badges.title: Volunteer Wrangler
badges.description: For whoever can turn five confused Burners into a work crew.

badges.title: Community Resilience Scout
badges.description: For preparedness, local knowledge, and helping people before things break.

badges.title: Radical Resourcefulness Badge
badges.description: For fixing the problem with trash, rope, solar, snacks, and charm.

badges.title: Public Benefit Goblin
badges.description: For tiny useful acts done anonymously.

badges.title: Leave It Better Officer
badges.description: For cleanups, repairs, beautification, and stewardship.

badges.title: Infrastructure Fairy
badges.description: For the person who magically makes water, shade, power, comms, or charging appear.
